input.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat: financeiro.js migra localStorage → API; layout responsivo mobile

- Remove hardcoded TRANSACOES array and _nextId; array now starts empty
- RAIOX_PADRAO keys renamed v: → valores: (23 items)
- Replace localStorage salvarRaioX/carregarRaioX with fetch PUT /api/financeiro/raiox
- Add carregarDados() calling both API endpoints in Promise.all
- initFinanceiro() now calls carregarDados() instead of atualizarTudo()+renderRaioX()
- Add adicionarTransacao/editarTransacao/deletarTransacao functions with API calls
- Rename all .v[ and .v. references to .valores in function bodies
- Add @media (max-width: 768px) responsive CSS to dashboard.css

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
